M8/#624, COMM S. KAPLAN, CSR L ESPINOSA, CLK H HAMILTON CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. DEFT TO PAY $936. IN BACK DUE RENT TO 3-13-98 AS FOLLOWS: $100. BY 2-27-98, $100. BY 3-6-98, $336. BY 3-13-98, AND ADDITIONAL $400.GRANT FROM ST. ANTHONY'S FOUNDATION ON BEHALF OF MR. PORTUGAL TO BE DELIVERED TO MR. PATEL, WHO WILL SIGN A W-9 AS SOON AS THE GRANT IS PRESENTED. PLTF TO PROVIDE DEFT WITH A FRONT DOOR KEY BY 8PM 2-19-98, TO INVESTIGATE AN INADEQUATE HEAT COMPLAINT & INSPECT & REPAIR WITHIN 48 HOURS. IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT TIMELY MADE, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES 1040 FOLSOM ST. #8, S.F. ONLY, PLTF IS WAIVING RENT & DAMAGES. IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE, PLTF WILL DISMISS W/PREJ BY 3-16-98.
